domains.name: Domain 2: Data Mining, Analysis, and Visualization

questions.text: Per official CompTIA exam objectives and study resources, which source should you use when studying Data Concepts and Environments for CompTIA Data+?
questions.explanation: Use Data+ Exam Objectives and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: According to 'Data+ Exam Objectives', what is a documented best practice for Data Concepts and Environments?

questions.text: Which approach BEST supports the objective to distinguish structured and unstructured data?
Which approach BEST supports the objective to describe data life cycle stages?
Which approach BEST supports the objective to compare relational and dimensional models?
What should you do FIRST to distinguish structured and unstructured data?
Which option is MOST appropriate to distinguish structured and unstructured data?
A technician must distinguish structured and unstructured data. What is the best choice?
What should you do FIRST to describe data life cycle stages?
Which option is MOST appropriate to describe data life cycle stages?
A technician must describe data life cycle stages. What is the best choice?
What should you do FIRST to compare relational and dimensional models?
Which option is MOST appropriate to compare relational and dimensional models?
A technician must compare relational and dimensional models. What is the best choice?
During troubleshooting, you must distinguish structured and unstructured data.
On the job, you need to describe data life cycle stages.
For compliance, the team must compare relational and dimensional models.
Per CompTIA best practices, you should distinguish structured and unstructured data.

Which approach BEST supports the objective to summarize datasets with aggregates?

options.text: GROUP BY with clear grain definitions
